session_label: Marashi-Najafi + Tehran University follow-on search execution
scope: Search-execution probe against the two Iranian portals identified as newly reachable in probe_2026-05-10_iran_caucasus_reachability.json. Goal: whether Cihanşah Qaraqoyunlu / Hakîkî / جهانشاه / حقیقی author/title queries surface any new manuscript witnesses, or any new codicology for the verified Tehran 8198 witness.
geopolitical_caveat: Iranian internet infrastructure is currently subject to wartime intermittent shutdowns (2026 conflict). The Marashi and Tehran U reachability documented on this date may not persist; results below are point-in-time as of 2026-05-10.

method_summary.marashi: WebFetch direct against the WordPress site search at https://marashilibrary.com/?s=<term>; no VPN; tested 7 query variants in Persian + Latin scripts plus the curated 'نفایس مخطوطات' (Precious Manuscripts) gallery page
method_summary.tehran_university: Playwright headless browser via direct connection (no VPN); navigated to landing page, tried the top-banner search box and the /fa/advanced-search endpoint; probed the /manuscripts URL path
method_summary.lib_eshia_ir_skipped: Skipped this round per low Hakîkî relevance (collection scope is Shi'i jurisprudence/hadith)

marashi_najafi.search_endpoint: https://marashilibrary.com/?s=<query> (WordPress site search via Google CSE; indexes blog posts, articles, and a separate /manuscript/<slug>/ post type)

queries_executed.outcome: all noise — every hit matches the تحقیق (research/verification) root; zero results reference Hakîkî the poet

page header confirms 'نتایج جستجو برای: جهانشاه' but listed entries are NOT direct Cihanşah hits; entries include Mush'asha treatises, Divan of Fakhri Heravi (the poet's own divan, not the tezkire), Tezkire-i Ravzatü's-Selâtīn (Fakhri's tezkire — flagged in our existing tezkires_unretrieved_targets), Sanai's Garden, and Tarikh al-Muluk; likely body-text false-positive matches but worth noting as adjacency
queries_executed.follow_on_value: the Tezkire-i Ravzatü's-Selâtīn surfacing under جهانشاه is the most interesting hint — could mean Marashi's holding of this tezkire mentions Cihanşah inside, but the WordPress site search is too coarse to confirm; direct catalogue access required

queries_executed.outcome: Tarikh al-Muluk = Tarikh-i khulafa va padshahan (History of Caliphs and Kings), serial number 19728, author unknown — Persian chronicle that mentions Karakoyunlu in its body; NOT a Hakîkî witness; manuscript URL constructed from the search snippet returned 404 on direct fetch (URL-encoding issue or moved record)
zero results — Marashi's indexer does not normalise the Kara/Qara variant
zero direct hits despite the title surfacing in the جهانشاه search above — confirms WordPress site search is body-text matching, not title-index matching
zero direct hits despite Fakhri Heravi entries surfacing in the جهانشاه search — same body-text matching limitation
zero results — Marashi indexes Persian script only, does not normalise Latin/Turkish orthography

precious_manuscripts_page_probe.type: curated image gallery (WordPress media uploads), not a searchable catalogue
precious_manuscripts_page_probe.cihansah_hakiki_mentions: none — collection focuses on classical Quranic, commentary, poetry, and legal works; no Cihanşah Hakîkî reference

marashi_najafi.outcome: ZERO new Cihanşah Hakîkî manuscript witnesses surfaced. The Marashi WordPress site search is too coarse for catalogue-level certainty. Substantive verification would require direct access to the Marashi institutional manuscript catalogue (likely on a separate subdomain such as fhq.marashi.ir or via the printed catalogue volumes; not probed this round).
follow_on_targets_for_future_session: Probe fhq.marashi.ir or other Marashi institutional-catalogue subdomain to bypass the WordPress site-search limitations
If Marashi holds a Tezkire-i Ravzatü's-Selâtīn manuscript, retrieve the relevant folios for any Cihanşah biographical entry — addresses the still-unretrieved Fakhri Heravi tezkire target
If Marashi holds the Tarikh al-Muluk chronicle (serial 19728) in scanned form, capture the Karakoyunlu chapter for context (not for the Hakîkî register but for v2.0 chancery/historiographic scope)

tehran_university.search_endpoint: https://library.ut.ac.ir/fa/search?query=<term> (delegates to Google Custom Search Engine cx=006239940977569577856:orpnzq9a1bw); /fa/advanced-search exposes a form but its fields are JS-loaded and were not surfaced in the accessibility snapshot

queries_executed.result_count: results section is empty in the snapshot; the page renders a Google CSE iframe that does not expose result content via the accessibility tree
queries_executed.outcome: site search is Google CSE for the library website's content (news, pages), NOT a manuscript-catalogue search; no manuscript records returned

manuscripts_subpath_probe.result: HTTP 404 Not Found — no manuscripts catalogue at this path

tehran_university.manuscript_catalogue_status: Tehran University's actual manuscript catalogue is at utdlib.ut.ac.ir (per Digital Orientalist 2023 and the project's 2026-05-02 search session). That subdomain timed out today. Per Digital Orientalist, the only working access path for manuscript orders is the Telegram channel @Manuscripts_lib, not a public web catalogue.
tehran_university.outcome: ZERO new codicology data for the verified Tehran 8198 witness; the manuscript catalogue endpoint remains unreachable via public web. Site landing reachability does not extend to catalogue searchability.
follow_on_targets_for_future_session: Re-attempt utdlib.ut.ac.ir on a future date when the geopolitical-caveat shutdown may have lifted
Direct Telegram contact via @Manuscripts_lib for the MS 8198 codicological description and any digital surrogate
ILL request through a Western university partnered with Tehran U for the MS 8198 record

false_positive_classes_documented: Persian تحقیق-root false positives in WordPress site search for حقیقی
WordPress body-text matching for جهانشاه returns adjacency hits (Fakhri Heravi divan, Ravzatü's-Selâtīn) without confirming whether they index Cihanşah specifically
Latin-script Cihanşah / Hakiki returns zero on Persian-only WordPress indexers
structural_findings: Marashi-Najafi WordPress site search is unsuitable for manuscript-catalogue-level queries; institutional catalogue lives elsewhere
Tehran University library landing is reachable but its manuscript-catalogue subdomain (utdlib.ut.ac.ir) and dedicated catalogue search are not; Telegram remains the documented order channel
The reachability gain on these two portals does not yet translate into search-execution gain for the Hakîkî census
summary.register_changes: none — witness_register.json is unchanged by this session
